releaseNotes:
# Moku v0.9.0
**Released:** April 24, 2026

>  **Manual install required for this update.** Due to the overhaul of the update system, v0.9.0 cannot be applied automatically. We apologize for the inconvenience!

## New Features
- **UI Overhaul** — Redesigned Home page, History page revamp, and a reworked Layout & Sidebar for a cleaner experience
- **Download Queue Management** — Batch select, error/retry support, move-to-top/bottom controls, tooltips, and download notifications (#38)
- **Automation Management** — New BulkAutomationPanel with auto-download list derived from filters (#39)
- **Per-Manga Reader Settings** — Custom reader settings on a per-manga basis, plus quick Settings access directly from the Reader (#42, #46)
- **Pin Sources** — Pin your favorite sources to the top of the Source Tab (#48)
- **Library Stats Overhaul** — Always-visible library stats with a full display overhaul (#47)
- **Source Install/Uninstall Notifications** — Get notified when extensions are installed or removed (#31)
- **Double-Tap for Reader Bar** — Improved touchscreen support with double-tap to toggle the reader bar (#29)
- **Import & Export Store** — Backup and restore your data with a new import/export system
- **QOL Animations** — Quality-of-life animations added across the app (Extensions, Local Source, and more)
- **Settings Descriptions** — Added descriptive labels throughout the Settings panel

## Bug Fixes
- Fixed slow thumbnail loading and high latency on non-downloaded manga (#33, #35)
- Fixed zoom values turning to NaN in the Reader
- Fixed dropdown rendering in Settings
- Fixed dark theme on Settings slider
- Fixed Library Refresh (#attempt)
- Fixed chapter nodes in LibraryUpdater
- Fixed Open in File Manager on Windows (#32)
- Fixed MacOS directory scan and connection issues (#40)
- Fixed Windows installer (TPU removal, WIP) (#41)
- Fixed tab boundary issues
- Fixed Local Source loading
- Fixed Reader optimizations and performance

## Notes
- Windows Auto-Installer improvements are ongoing (WIP)
- MacOS connection fixes are in testing — please report any remaining issues (#40)
- Touchscreen/gesture improvements are continuing — more coming in a future release (#29, #50)

**Full Changelog:** https://github.com/Youwes09/Moku/compare/v0.8.0...v0.9.0
